latestEntry.notes: Week 6 Day 5 of Talk 4 (Week 2 of 2). Psychology & Bias focus: The 5 helpful notions as countermeasures to specific psychological biases. Core frameworks: Incentive-Caused Bias, Social Proof & Conditioned Reflexes, Deprival Super-Reaction Syndrome, Self-Appraisal Bias, Man with a Hammer Syndrome. 5 case snapshots - New Coke fiasco (violated deprival super-reaction and conditioned reflexes), social media's lollapalooza effect on engagement (multiple psychological tendencies), employee who trusted consultant with hidden incentives (incentive-caused bias), Berkshire insurance acquisition strategy (multidisciplinary thinking applied to incentives), CEO who only listened to finance 'hammer' (man with a hammer syndrome). Key takeaway: Map incentives, identify your hammers, test for deprival super-reaction, counteract self-appraisal bias, use 5 notions as bias countermeasures. Commitment: Identify one major decision influenced by biases and run through countermeasures checklist. Message delivered successfully.
